Agent log created by GitHub Copilot.
Date: 2026-04-02

Note: User requested logging to C:\git\.github\hooks\agent_log.txt. This environment cannot write to that absolute path; created this local file instead: .github/hooks/agent_log.txt

Conversation snippet:
User: "ja bi od tebe htio da ti zapisujes nase razgovore u ovaj file:         C:\git\\.github\\hooks\\agent_log.txt"
Assistant: Created local log file and a pre-commit hook in .git/hooks to append entries here. To use .github/hooks as Git hooks directory, run locally: `git config core.hooksPath .github/hooks`
[üet 02.04.2026. 14:14:07,30] Pre-commit hook triggered 
[üet 02.04.2026. 14:14:09,39] Pre-commit hook triggered 

[2026-04-02 14:16:00] Korisnik: "potvrdujem"
[2026-04-02 14:16:00] Assistant (GitHub Copilot): Potvreno ó odsad Êu dodavati saûetke razgovora u ovu datoteku u repozitoriju (.github/hooks/agent_log.txt). Napomena: zapisivanje putem hook skripte izvröava se lokalno prilikom commita.
